description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Rio Grande do Sul, founded in 1990 inside the Central Prison of Porto Alegre by Dilonei Melara. It is one of the two largest criminal groups in the state, alongside Bala na Cara, and focuses on drug trafficking, robberies, money laundering, and other violent crimes. The group has expanded to neighboring states and countries such as Uruguay and Paraguay, and is considered the largest criminal organization in Rio Grande do Sul.

country_links.evidence_quote: principalmente em rotas que atravessam o Mato Grosso do Sul , Rio Grande do Sul , e outros estados fronteiriços com Paraguai e Bolívia , além de expandirem suas atividades no Uruguai .
country_links.context: Os Manos use routes through Bolivia for drug trafficking in alliance with the PCC.

country_links.evidence_quote: Eles têm presença em cidades de Santa Catarina próximas à fronteira, no Mato Grosso do Sul , Paraná , Uruguai , Paraguai , atuando junto ao PCC .
country_links.context: Os Manos have a presence in Paraguay, acting alongside the PCC.

country_links.evidence_quote: Território(s): Rio Grande do Sul, Uruguai , Paraguai Santa Catarina , Paraná , Mato Grosso do Sul
country_links.context: The organization has territory in Paraguay.
